svg:
TTL Cache UML Class Diagram — Full Complete UML class diagram for a generic TTL Cache with pluggable eviction strategies, showing TTLCache, CacheEntry, EvictionStrategy interface, LRUStrategy, LFUStrategy, and KeyFreqPair classes with proper UML notation.
CacheEntry<K,V> «data class» + key: K + value: V - expirationTime: long - lastAccessTime: long - accessCount: int + isExpiredAt(now:long) : boolean + updateAccessTime(): void + incrementCount(): void + getExpirationTime(): long
TTLCache<K,V> «thread-safe» - capacity: int - defaultTTL: long - dataStore: ConcurrentHashMap<K, CacheEntry<K,V>> - ttlHeap: PriorityQueue<CacheEntry<K,V>> - strategy: EvictionStrategy<K> - scheduler: ScheduledExecutorService - lock: ReadWriteLock + put(key:K, value:V, ttl:long): void + put(key:K, value:V): void + get(key:K): Optional<V> + remove(key:K): boolean - evictExpiredEntries(): void - evictByStrategy(): void
EvictionStrategy<K> «interface» + onKeyAccessed(key:K): void + onKeyAdded(key:K): void + onKeyRemoved(key:K): void + getEvictionCandidate(): K + size(): int
LRUStrategy<K> implements EvictionStrategy<K> - map: LinkedHashMap<K,Boolean> - capacity: int - lock: ReentrantLock + onKeyAccessed(key:K): void + onKeyAdded(key:K): void + onKeyRemoved(key:K): void + getEvictionCandidate(): K
LFUStrategy<K> implements EvictionStrategy<K> - freqMap: HashMap<K,Integer> - buckets: HashMap<Int,LinkedHashSet<K>> - minFreq: int + onKeyAccessed(key:K): void + onKeyAdded(key:K): void + onKeyRemoved(key:K): void + getEvictionCandidate(): K
Legend
implements (interface realization)
aggregation (has-a, shared lifecycle)
composition (has-a, owned lifecycle)
+ public - private «tag» stereotype
CacheEntry (TTLCache owns entries) -->
EvictionStrategy (strategy injected) -->
EvictionStrategy -->
EvictionStrategy -->
